text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! Your application for moderator role has been approved. Please review the moderator guidelines in #moderator-resources and reach out if you have any questions.
Welcome @guide_sam! Your application for event_helper role has been approved. Check out #event-planning for upcoming events and #event-helpers for resources.
Welcome @newbie_kim! Your membership has been approved. Please read #community-guidelines and introduce yourself in #introductions!
Welcome @mentor_lina! Your application for mentor role has been approved. Please join #mentor-lounge and review the mentor onboarding materials.
